title: lithocardium brevispicatum
intro: Lithocardium brevispicatum, also known as Lithocarpus brevispicatus, is a species of tree belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae) and native to China. The bark of Lithocardium brevispicatum has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular protective effects. The health benefits of Lithocardium brevispicatum include reducing blood pressure, improving blood circulation, and preventing cardiovascular diseases. Herbal preparations of Lithocardium brevispicatum are typically made from the dried bark, which can be decocted or infused in tea for medicinal use.
